name: vibe-check
description: An adaptive production-readiness audit for vibe-coded (AI-generated) apps. The vibe-check audit skill profiles your app from its code, checks only the areas that apply, grades each with cited evidence, and ends with a prioritized gap table — then routes fixes to focused skills for security, auth, scaling, data, AI/LLM cost, observability, deployment, reliability, compliance, API design, frontend quality, cost, and monetization.
